description: Diagnoses duplicate log output caused by propagate and duplicate handlers

input.question: Every log message in my Python app appears twice. I've set up a StreamHandler on my app logger. What's wrong?

description: Explains that libraries must not configure logging and should add only a NullHandler

input.question: I'm writing a Python library. Should I call logging.basicConfig() at the top of my package __init__.py?

description: Recommends contextvars for request-scoped structured logging in async code

input.question: I'm using structlog in a FastAPI app. How do I attach a request ID to every log line within a single request without passing it manually everywhere?
